'''Gra''' were herd [[Mammal/Legends|mammals]] raised by [[Farmer/Legends|farmers]] on a number of [[Planet/Legends|planets]].

==Biology and appearance==
They were four-legged goatlike [[Mammal/Legends|mammals]] with [[Color/Legends|white]] [[Hair/Legends|fur]] and twin horns atop their head; they made a brawling sound.<ref name="RA">''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]''</ref> Gras bounced on flat areas.<ref name="JK">''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]''</ref>

==Behavior and intelligence==
Due to their [[Bioengineering/Legends|genetic engineering]], gras had preprogrammed instincts to survive dangerous environments and predators; one directed them to seek elevated ground when daylight started to dim.<ref name="JK" />

Gra flocks followed a dominant [[Alpha]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], and his mate, [[Beta]]; in cases they had to split, a portion of the flock followed Beta.<ref name="JK" />

==History==
They were [[Gene/Legends|genetically]] engineered to be hardier and have better survival instincts in the wilderness. Entire herds of frozen [[Reproduction/Legends|fertilized]] gra [[Ovum|ova]] were sold, to be thawed out and grown by [[Farmer/Legends|farmers]] on new [[Planet/Legends|worlds]], along their manual.<ref name="JK" /> Farmers raised gra herds on [[Sulon/Legends|Sulon]]<ref name="RA" /> and [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]],<ref name="JK" /> among others.

In [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]] a herder was on the road outside the western gate of the [[city/Legends|city]] on his way to the market next morning, when an [[Imperial Remnant|Imperial]] force was returning to their base after twelve [[standard hour/Legends|hours]] of patrol.<ref name="RAAD">[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Rebel Agent'' audio drama]]</ref> A [[speeder bike/Legends|speeder bike]] traversed the flock, splitting it in half, [[Imperial_commando/Legends|Imperial commandos]] kicked the [[Species/Legends|animals]], which ran in circles, and an [[All_Terrain_Scout_Transport/Legends|AT-ST]] stepped on one, crushing it. The unfortunate owner tried to put things in place. The chaos gave [[Kyle Katarn]] an opportunity to hijack the [[Walker/Legends|AT-ST]] and [[Mission to Sulon|sneak into the city]].<ref name="RA" />

Another flock of gra was on a hilltop near [[Fuel City]]; as the ''[[Moldy Crow/Legends|Moldy Crow]]'' skimmed it, they scattered.<ref name="RA" />

On Ruusan, [[Grif Grawley]] had a herd of 136 gra.<ref name="JK" />

==Behind the scenes==
In the [[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Rebel Agent'' audio drama]] the gra herder is uncredited, although his voice resembles that of [[Christopher Bloch]].
